ksa_text: Knowledge of data valuation and infonomics methodologies, including frameworks for quantifying data as an enterprise asset and connecting data investment to measurable financial outcomes.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Data Protection Officer scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("data   :monetiz|valuation|product|asset management", "infonomics"). STRM composite is strong (0.4222). Domain Leadership & Strategy (affinity 0.60) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in governance job postings or certification curricula (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP CIPP/CIPM, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Would a working Data Protection Officer self-report this as a required competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the governance competency is implicit in Data Protection Officer practice (domain affinity 0.60, 2 GOV signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate governance competencies.
